sourceTitle: The First Battlestar Galactica Seder Haggadah

modules.exactText: The parsley represents the spring time, renewal, the lush verdancy of our home world, Ḳobol. Also, the algae slop we have been eating for the past three years.

locator.edition: The First Battlestar Galactica Seder Haggadah
locator.sourceLocation: Official Open Siddur snapshot post 19097, Seder Plate / The Green

modules.exactText: The fourth cup is the cup of fellowship. We must always remember our responsibility to this fleet and to the survival of the human race.
